+ "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss_SSS"
+ "{\n  \"$schema\": \"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema\",\n  \"description\": \"JSON schema for Voice Control Intelligence Report A Concern Feedback\",\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"prompt\", \"command_identifier\", \"model_response\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"prompt\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n    \"command_identifier\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n    \"model_response\": {\n      \"type\": \"object\",\n      \"required\": [\"tool\"],\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"tool\": { \"type\": \"string\", \"enum\": [\"tap\", \"swipe\", \"disambiguate\", \"terminate\"] },\n        \"point\": {\n          \"type\": \"object\",\n          \"required\": [\"x\", \"y\"],\n          \"properties\": { \"x\": { \"type\": \"number\" }, \"y\": { \"type\": \"number\" } }\n        },\n        \"direction\": { \"type\": \"string\", \"enum\": [\"up\", \"down\", \"left\", \"right\"] },\n        \"points\": {\n          \"type\": \"array\",\n          \"items\": {\n            \"type\": \"object\",\n            \"required\": [\"x\", \"y\"],\n            \"properties\": { \"x\": { \"type\": \"number\" }, \"y\": { \"type\": \"number\" } }\n          }\n        }\n      },\n      \"allOf\": [\n        { \"if\": { \"properties\": { \"tool\": { \"const\": \"tap\" } } },          \"then\": { \"required\": [\"point\"] } },\n        { \"if\": { \"properties\": { \"tool\": { \"const\": \"swipe\" } } },        \"then\": { \"required\": [\"point\", \"direction\"] } },\n        { \"if\": { \"properties\": { \"tool\": { \"const\": \"disambiguate\" } } }, \"then\": { \"required\": [\"points\"] } }\n      ]\n    }\n  }\n}"
+ "\xb1"
